owner_operator_stated: The address 820 (W) Laraway Rd, New Lenox, IL 60451 is occupied by Nelson Ridge Family Dental, whose current roster (Etchison, Pycinska, Djordjevic, Danesh, Brady) does not include Dr. Irum Tariq. public_practice_name: Perfect Smiles (Oak Forest / formerly Oakview Dental Group)
owner_operator_stated: BBB lists Dr. Lena Halikias as owner of 'Perfect Smiles' at 5950 159th St / 5950 W 159th St, Oak Forest, IL 60452, phone (708) 687-4280 -- an exact address+phone match to this record, but operating under the brand 'Perfect Smiles' (allperfectsmiles.com), not the named entity 'Oak View Dental Group, Ltd.' Dr. Basel Hajjar, one of the original Oak View Dental Group dentists (per legacy Yelp listing showing Austin/Levoy/Stern/Hajjar), still appears associated with this office, suggesting an acquisition/rebrand rather than full staff turnover.
notes: Record address (5950 159th St, Oak Forest) and phone ((708) 687-4280) both exactly match the current occupant, branded 'Perfect Smiles' (part of a small multi-location group -- also has a Beverly/Chicago office at 10601 S Western Ave under a different owner-dentist, Dr. Stephen Morris). Could not load allperfectsmiles.com's dedicated Oak Forest office page directly (404) to confirm a current full roster or careers page; provider_count_website reflects only the 2 names found via search.

Separately, this record's exact phone number (708) 423-0940 is now used by a DIFFERENT practice, 'Perry Rossino Site 1' (Rossino Dental), at a different address (4445 W 95th St, Oak Lawn, IL) -- also not the named entity. Both the address and the phone lead to two different, unrelated current practices, neither of which is 'Oak Lawn Dental Care, PC.'
notes: Two-way conflict: address match -> Family Dental Care (different phone); phone match -> Perry Rossino Site 1 (different address). Family Dental Care has a careers page link (https://www.familydentalcare.com/careers-opportunities/) but current openings were not verified, and it does not belong to the named entity, so has_hiring_page/openings are left unset for this record.
